instruction: parse_ages in parser.py crashes on (a) empty input '' (raises ValueError on int('')) and (b) invalid integer tokens like 'abc'. Modify parse_ages so: empty input returns []; pure-whitespace input returns []; invalid tokens are silently skipped; negative integers like '-5' parse correctly; decimal tokens like '1.5' are skipped (NOT converted with float()); valid integers are still parsed correctly. All tests in tests/test_parser.py must pass without breaking the happy path.
calibration_note: Hardened 2026-04-25 (option 3). Added: negative-int parse, pure-whitespace returns empty, decimals skipped (anti-float() trap). See docs/PROJECT_KNOWLEDGE_BASE.md §28.4.
